> Duplicate this file when documenting a new feature. Update frontmatter values accordingly.

## Summary
Describe the feature, why it exists, and the persona it serves.

## Prerequisites
- Requirement 1
- Requirement 2

## Setup
1. Step-by-step instructions with screenshots if needed.
2. Include CLI/API snippets where useful.

## Validation
Explain how the user knows the feature works.

## Troubleshooting
Provide two to three common break/fix items or FAQs.
